description: OpenHarness v0.7 Convergence — strip-down + SPEC alignment. Lands SPEC v0.7 as additive amendments, replaces the 1,900 LOC heartbeat daemon with a tiny croner runtime, deletes the @openharness/sandbox CLI atomically with all dependent surfaces, rewrites marketing for single-project framing, triages 14 orchestrator skills, empties the pi-coupled workspace template, migrates memory to per-day directories, and tags a release. Tracks GitHub issue #210.

userStories.title: Draft SPEC v0.7 amendments
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want SPEC v0.7 to resolve the seven conflicts identified by critics so subsequent migration PRs have a single source of truth.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new file .claude/specs/structure-spec-v0.7.md (additive only; no breaking changes from v0.6)
Add §'Harness Packs' section: 10-key harness.json contract, three source modes (npm/git/local), registry path .openharness/harnesses.json, workspace_seed semantics or removal
Add §'Orchestrator vs workspace agent skills' section clarifying the two-tier scope split
Add §'oh CLI' section declaring the CLI deprecated in v0.7 and docker compose as the canonical substrate
Add §'Documentation source' section clarifying docs/wiki/ is the path (not bare wiki/)
Add §'Image name' section declaring ghcr.io/ryaneggz/openharness canonical; remove ruska-ai/sandboxes reference
Add §'Croner runtime' section specifying runtime owner, tmux startup mechanism, and restart policy
Add §'Hook execution mechanism' section: GitHub Actions for CI hooks, git hooks for local
Add §'Memory structure' decision: directory-per-day (memory/YYYY-MM-DD/) is canonical; flat files deprecated
Add §'Tasks vs .ralph' decision: tasks/<taskdesc>/ per SPEC; .ralph/ deprecated
Shrink over-specified sections: apps/web/ JS config snippet, eval flakiness budget rubric, wiki-sync 1-5 rubric, blog authorship model, weekly cleanup cron
Add CHANGELOG entry under [Unreleased] ### Added
Markdown lint passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed iteration 1 on 2026-05-02; SPEC v0.7 drafted at .claude/specs/structure-spec-v0.7.md with all 9 required sections + shrunk over-specified prose; CHANGELOG entry added

userStories.title: Implement croner runtime script
userStories.description: As an orchestrator, I want a tiny croner script that reads crons/*.md markdown frontmatter and schedules tasks, replacing the 1,900 LOC heartbeat daemon.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/cron-runtime.ts (≤120 LOC) using the croner npm package
Parse YAML frontmatter from crons/*.md: id, schedule, timezone, enabled, overlap, catchup
Skip files where enabled is false
On cron fire, run the body of the .md as a prompt to claude -p (or configurable agent binary via env var)
Log to crons/cron-runtime.log with timestamp, cron id, and status
Use file-based PID lock at crons/.pid to prevent double-firing on restart
Exit cleanly on SIGTERM
Add vitest unit tests covering frontmatter parsing, skip-when-disabled, and PID-lock collision
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed iteration 2 on 2026-05-02; scripts/cron-runtime.ts (119 LOC) + 9 vitest tests at scripts/__tests__/, croner added as root dep, root vitest.config.ts wires the script tests into pnpm run test

userStories.title: Wire croner into devcontainer entrypoint
userStories.description: As a sandbox user, I want the croner runtime to start automatically in a tmux session per the sandbox-processes rule.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh to launch tmux new-session -d -s system-cron 'node scripts/cron-runtime.ts 2>&1 | tee /tmp/system-cron.log'
Remove old heartbeat-daemon startup block from entrypoint
Confirm tmux ls inside the sandbox shows the system-cron session after a fresh container start
Container restart cleanly relaunches the tmux session
Manual smoke test: docker compose down then docker compose up -d results in croner running on first boot
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed iteration 3 on 2026-05-02; .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh launches scripts/cron-runtime.ts in system-cron tmux session with idempotent has-session guard, --experimental-strip-types for Node 22 TS, and crons/ dir prep; commit fc8ff2b

userStories.title: Seed reserved crons
userStories.description: As an orchestrator, I want the two SPEC-reserved crons (heartbeat.md, cleanup-tasks.md) seeded as canonical examples.
acceptanceCriteria: Create crons/heartbeat.md with frontmatter schedule '0 * * * *', enabled true, body per SPEC §crons reserved
Create crons/cleanup-tasks.md with frontmatter schedule '0 23 * * 0' (Sunday 23:00), body archives completed tasks per SPEC §'Weekly task cleanup'
No other crons seeded — substrate stays empty for users to add
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed iteration 4 on 2026-05-02; crons/heartbeat.md (0 * * * *) + crons/cleanup-tasks.md (0 23 * * 0) seeded with SPEC v0.7-conformant frontmatter (id/schedule/timezone/enabled/overlap/catchup); verified parseCronFile + croner accept both; .gitignore extended to skip crons/.pid + crons/cron-runtime.log; commit 28aef83

userStories.title: Tag release and verify post-convergence image
userStories.description: Currently :latest GHCR image still contains pi/mom code. Tag a release once US-001 through US-016 land so :latest reflects the post-convergence state.
acceptanceCriteria: All prior stories merged to development then to main
Promote CHANGELOG [Unreleased] section to a versioned section using CalVer (YYYY.M.D[-N])
Push release/<VERSION> branch and tag <VERSION> per .claude/rules/git.md release procedure
release.yml CI workflow completes successfully and pushes ghcr.io/ryaneggz/openharness:<VERSION> + :latest
docker run --rm ghcr.io/ryaneggz/openharness:latest which pi returns non-zero (pi removed)
docker run --rm ghcr.io/ryaneggz/openharness:latest which oh returns non-zero (CLI removed)
GitHub Release published with body matching the CHANGELOG section
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: BLOCKED iteration 17 on 2026-05-02; release tagging is human-gated and out of the Ralph loop's reach from a task branch — AC#1 requires PR merge to development then to main (orchestrator cannot merge); AC#3 requires pushing release/<VERSION> branch + tag <VERSION> from the source branch (.claude/rules/git.md § Releases), which the orchestrator is forbidden from doing from dev/main; ACs #4-7 depend on the tag triggering release.yml. CHANGELOG promotion is intentionally NOT done on this task branch (the /release skill performs the promotion on the source branch at tag time). Handoff: after this task branch merges into development → main, a maintainer runs /release from main; the skill computes VERSION = 2026.5.2 (today's first release; 2026.5.1 already exists), promotes [Unreleased] → [2026.5.2], pushes release/2026.5.2 + tag 2026.5.2, and verifies via docker run --rm ghcr.io/ryaneggz/openharness:latest which pi/oh both return non-zero. STATUS: COMPLETE appended to progress.txt because all in-loop convergence work is done (16/17 stories pass); only the post-merge release tag remains.
